slide1.title: Welcome!
slide1.description: The ICL-Mobile app is your place for mobility to and from the Innovation Campus Lemgo.

slide2.title: Plan Your Trips
slide2.description: You can use the app to plan your journeys and collect points for the climate!

slide3.title: Your Favorites
slide3.description: Eating ice cream in the city or going for pizza? Save all your favorite places!

slide4.title: Your CO<sub>2</sub> Wallet
slide4.description: You can see how much CO<sub>2</sub> you have saved with the app in your CO<sub>2</sub> Wallet.

slide1.title: Organize Favorites
slide1.description: Bring order to your favorites collection, quickly and easily.

slide2.title: Ride Options
slide2.description: By bike or by bus today? You decide!

dialog.title: Reset Tours
dialog.text: All guided app tours are now visible again.

carPoolSetup.title: Car Pool Setup
carPoolSetup.text:
In order to use car pooling in our app, it is necessary to download the RRive app. This free application is essential for both passengers and car pool providers.

The RRive app allows you to create and manage rides, as well as search for available car pool opportunities. Without the RRive app, you will not be able to access the key features of car pooling.

Download the RRive app now to take advantage of the benefits of car pooling and make your travels more efficient!
carPoolSetup.linking-hint: If you want to unlink your account, please contact the support of the car pooling app:

appsecurity.title: Security
appsecurity.account-footer: Delete your account and your data
appsecurity.account-header: You really want to leave us?
appsecurity.account-text:
Please note that deleting your user account in our app will result in all your data being irrevocably deleted.

This action cannot be undone and your information cannot be restored.

Make sure you have backed up all required data before continuing.

dialog.confirm-delete: Do you really want to delete your ICL-Mobile account?

error.title: Error
error.text: Please check the data you provided
error.servertext: Your request could not be handled right now. Please try again later!
error.wrong-code: The code you entered was incorrect.
error.wrong-email: The entered email address is not registered.
error.wrong-password: The entered email address was found, but the password is incorrect.
error.not-verified-email: Your email was not verfied yet.
error.restart-verify-register: Please retry by clicking the registration button again.
error.getting-image-failed: Loading the image from your photo-roll failed:
error.not-logged-in: You are not logged in yet. We forward you now to the login page.
error.not-authorized: Error with authentication. Please try to login again.
error.bad-request: Your request resulted in an unknown error. Please try again or contact support.
error.bad-booking: We could not find a booking for your request. Please try again or contact support.
error.max-distance:
Unfortunately, your request could not be processed because it exceeds the maximum search radius of the app.

Please choose a closer destination.
error.app-linking-error: You need to be logged in to use this feature!
error.phone-verification-failed: Your cellphone number could not be verified, please check the number and try again!
error.email-verification-failed: Your email address could not be verified, please check the email and try again!
error.timeout: The connection to the vehicle has timed out. Please try again.

success.text: The code was correct and your changes were saved successfully!
success.title: All done
success.correct-code: The code you entered was correct.
success.mail: Your email address was verified successfully.
success.phone: Your phone number was verified successfully.
success.enterCode: Please enter the 6 digit code we sent you.
success.ride-cancel: Your ride has been canceled successfully.
success.asset-unlocked: Your ride was unlocked successfully. Have a save trip!
success.asset-locked: Your ride was locked successfully. Thank you!

hint.title: Note
hint.no-offer:
Unfortunately, we were unable to find any results for your request.

However, you can of course use your own bike or scooter or create a carpool offer.
